description: Opt-in, tier-3-gated HAMR module packaging the Epic #2791 fleet (local-LLM) development capability. A fleetless (Tier 0-2) operator carries zero fleet-dev code: the gate scripts/global/fleet-dev-module.js offers the fleet-dev lane only when this module is installed AND enabled AND MEGINGJORD_MINIMUM_TIER >= 3. The baseline router (model-routing-engine.js) has no fleet-dev imports, so baseline routing is byte-for-byte unchanged when the module is off (design D16; tier taxonomy instructions/resource-tier-portability.instructions.md).
installPrecedent: #2379 plugin model — discrete enable via the env flag; no fleet config required when disabled.
baselineInvariant: Tier-1 (GitHub + git + node) carries no fleet-dev code; an excludes-fleet deploy omits the members below; the gate guarantees baseline behaviour at runtime regardless.
